name: Derrick Gardner
abstract: Derrick Gardner (born June 3, 1965) is an American jazz trumpeter from Chicago, Illinois. Gardner began playing trumpet at the age of 9 in his hometown of Chicago.

interviews.title: Derrick Gardner interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clinton, New York, May 9, 2013

about_quotes.speaker: Frank Foster
about_quotes.evidence: I have trumpet section consisting of ... I have Derrick Gardner.
about_quotes.doc_title: Frank Foster — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
